message: I mean, the person they say is Tony's girlfriend. Was she super lovely?
Hey, it’s rare for you to call, what's up?
I'm being chased by the police. What should I do?
I have no idea what to do. Detective, don’t you have any old acquaintances in the police?
Do you know the location of this office?
Then, can you come here and fill me in?
It's no trouble at all. More importantly, what happened?
The sound of restless walking seems to be echoing down to the lower floor. I hope the downstairs residents don't complain.
but due to the ruckus brought in by him, there's an unusual tension filling the room.
It's rare for this kind of client to come to my office.
He’s pacing restlessly back and forth in the room. It’s a relief he thought of me.
If he were to panic and disappear, he’d really end up being chased by the police.
He’s quite shaken up. It’s no surprise that an ordinary person would be shocked at suddenly being labeled a murder suspect.
It seems he was doubly shocked by Cindy being murdered and being named her suspect. I have to calm him down.
Gloria? You knew her phone number?
I don’t know how he found it, but he might have heard it from the master at FLIX.
And then he suddenly said, 'You did it, didn’t you?'
I had no idea what he was talking about.
Then he said Ariana was dead.
The thing I feared has become a reality.
In the end, Cindy disappeared without a trace and never returned alive.
Yet that woman told the police I killed Ariana.
It's okay, you don't have to be so scared.
But, no one is going to believe me.
? If this goes on, I'll be caught as the culprit!
I don't think that's going to happen.
I might be seen as the culprit by the police.
I heard they got to Gloria, cutting her from the ankle it seems.
She must be the culprit behind the serial murder case, right!?
The female reporter had her ear cut off, and the director's acquaintance had his hand sent, didn't he? They're the same, right?
The director's acquaintance's story was something Gloria mentioned.
I got a call from Gloria this morning. I was woken up by that call.
And that's when you heard about Cindy?
That woman suddenly blamed me on the phone.
It's all your fault, she said it was because of you.
Gloria must have been really upset.
